Having made significant strides in cultural anthropology, Jed Wain is the author of the groundbreaking work, Elemental Pulse Engine. His affiliation with the Desert Glass Walkers enables him to merge his academic pursuits with a passion for exploring desert environments. Talia Raymond played a crucial role as his mentor and doctoral advisor, shaping his scholarly path. The Fleetwing Discovery Agency has been pivotal as his primary funding source, allowing him to fund various research projects. This combination of expertise, mentorship, and support has marked Jed's career with notable achievements.

Jed Wain specializes in cultural anthropology and has authored the influential work, Elemental Pulse Engine, which investigates cultural and environmental interactions. He is a dedicated member of the Desert Glass Walkers, a society that focuses on researching desert habitats and their cultural significance. Throughout his academic journey, he has benefited from the expertise of his mentor and doctoral advisor, Talia Raymond. Moreover, the Fleetwing Discovery Agency has been his primary funding source, enabling his innovative research. With these accomplishments, Jed continues to push the boundaries of anthropological study.
